goal: Audit and implement the intended canonical 0-9999 dynasty valuation architecture in the real live code path. Focus on source value -> canonical site value -> rawCompositeValue -> finalAdjustedValue -> rankings UI render. Remove drift between frontend and backend where possible, keep changes targeted, and do not redesign unrelated systems.
implementation_rules: Do not redesign the app from scratch.
Keep changes tightly scoped to the canonical 0-9999 valuation architecture.
Do not infer correctness from helper names or comments.
Prefer one authoritative live path over duplicate parallel implementations.
Avoid display-only remaps that mask deeper architectural issues.
If a backend and frontend rule differ, either unify them or make the discrepancy explicit and intentional.
audit_requirements: Verify rankings table site/source columns are rendering canonical transformed values, not raw pData values.
Trace the real live path used to build rawCompositeValue.
Verify rank and averaged-rank inputs flow through the intended monotonic rank-to-value curve.
Inspect KTC and IDP Trade Calculator handling for native 9999 source behavior and policy exceptions.
Verify pure IDP ranking sources use a multi-anchor IDP backbone in the live path.
Trace the actual live path for finalAdjustedValue and determine whether it is a real modeled value or a cosmetic remap.
Compare frontend and backend for logic drift affecting canonical values, site handling, IDP handling, or final score behavior.
Search for duplicate canonical conversion logic, old rank formulas, old idpRank formulas, raw pData display paths, and dead-but-still-live branches.
